title: PokeBall
description: Capture your favorite mob with the pokeball !
body:
**About**
- This mod independently ported Poke Ball from Grim3212's mod to Fabric.

 

**Item**
- Pokeball: Throw it to capture a Mob, throw it again to release.
 

**Recipes**
- ![ ](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mirkiri/PokeBall/1.19/imgs/recipes.png)


**Dependencies**
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and [Cloth Config API(6.2.57+)](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
 

**Config**
- BLACKLIST：Blacklisted mobs will not be captured by the pokeball, ex: minecraft:zombie.

 

- allowCaptureOfAllTypes：Is it possible to capture all types of entities, if true, non-living things like boats can be captured.
